info.title: dotnet-gcdump
info.description: .NET Managed Heap Dump and Analysis Tool

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandLineConfiguration.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

commands.name: collect
commands.description: Collects a diagnostic trace from a currently running process

options.name: --process-id
options.description: The process id to collect the gcdump from.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path where collected gcdumps should be written. Defaults to '.\YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_<pid>.gcdump' where YYYYMMDD is Year/Month/Day and HHMMSS is Hour/Minute/Second. Otherwise, it is the full path and file name of the dump.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Output the log while collecting the gcdump.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Give up on collecting the gcdump if it takes longer than this many seconds. The default value is 30s.

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the process to collect the gcdump from.

options.name: --diagnostic-port
options.description: The path to a diagnostic port to collect the dump from.

options.name: --dsrouter
options.description: The dsrouter command to use for collecting the gcdump. If specified, the --process-id, --name, or --diagnostic-port options cannot be used.

commands.name: ps
commands.description: Lists the dotnet processes that gcdumps can be collected from.

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate report into stdout from a previously generated gcdump or from a running process.

options.name: --process-id
options.description: The process id to collect the gcdump from.

options.name: --report-type
options.description: The type of report to generate. Available options: heapstat (default)

options.name: --diagnostic-port
options.description: The path to a diagnostic port to collect the dump from.

arguments.name: gcdump_filename
arguments.description: The file to read gcdump from.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Converts nettrace file into .gcdump file handled by analysis tools. Can only convert from the nettrace format.

options.name: --output
options.description: The path where converted gcdump should be written. Defaults to '<input>.gcdump'

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Output the log while converting the gcdump.

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Input trace file to be converted.
